title: T-009 — context endpoints sites/lines/shifts + POST /context (06-a)
prompt:
# T-009 — site / line / shift context endpoints

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-BE-006/007/008/009, §12.5 RBAC
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land the four endpoints SCN-012 needs to load sites/lines/shifts and persist the chosen context onto the active scanner_sessions row.

## Implementation contract
1. `GET /api/scanner/context/sites` — return sites the authenticated user may access (org_id RLS + users.allowed_sites). Response: `[{ id, code, name }]`.
2. `GET /api/scanner/context/lines?site_id=` — return lines at site filtered by users.allowed_lines (if set, else all). Response: `[{ id, code, name, device_mode_default }]`.
3. `GET /api/scanner/context/shifts` — return active shifts (default 3: morning/afternoon/night with start/end times from settings).
4. `POST /api/scanner/context` — body Zod `{ site_id, line_id, shift_id, device_mode? }`; updates current scanner_sessions row's site_id/line_id/shift_id/device_mode (if user.preferred_device_mode allows the override; never personal→kiosk by user, only kiosk→personal denial).
5. Audit-log every POST.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/context/sites/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/context/lines/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/context/shifts/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/context/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/scanner-context.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a user with allowed_sites=[FNOR], when GET /api/scanner/context/sites runs, then the response only contains the FNOR row
2. Given a session with device_mode='kiosk', when POST /api/scanner/context with device_mode='personal' runs, then it responds 403 SC_DEVICE_MODE_DOWNGRADE_FORBIDDEN and scanner_sessions.device_mode stays 'kiosk'
3. Given a valid POST /api/scanner/context, when it succeeds, then scanner_sessions row's site_id/line_id/shift_id are updated and a scanner_audit_log row with scan_type='context_set' is written

## Test strategy
- RED: write scanner-context.test.ts asserting allowed_sites filter + downgrade rejection + audit row before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/scanner-context'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow user to set site_id outside their allowed_sites
- Do not skip RLS on the site/line lookup
- Do not let an inactive shift be chosen

pipeline_inputs.description: GET sites/lines/shifts + POST set-context endpoints feeding SCN-012; enforces allowed_sites and kiosk downgrade rule.
pipeline_inputs.details: Four route handlers backed by RLS. POST applies the user's allowed_sites/allowed_lines filter, blocks kiosk→personal downgrade by user, and writes audit row. Lines GET also returns line.device_mode_default so the UI can preselect.
out_of_scope: Do not build SCN-012 UI here (T-021)
Do not implement shift_enforcement policy (OQ-SC-02 carry-forward)
Do not implement device pairing endpoints (T-022 owns SCN-013 backend hooks)
